title: Auto Totem+
description: A great way to dominate in Minecraft pvp, especially with crystals!
body:
# 🛡️ Auto Totem - Never Die Unexpectedly Again!

Tired of forgetting to equip your Totem of Undying? Auto Totem has you covered! This lightweight mod automatically moves totems from your inventory to your offhand, giving you instant protection from lethal damage.

## ✨ Key Features

**🔄 Automatic Equipping**
Totems are instantly moved to your offhand whenever it's empty or doesn't contain a totem. Set it and forget it!

**⌨️ Toggle Keybind**
Press R to quickly enable or disable auto-equipping. Perfect for when you need manual control.

**⚡ Performance Optimized**
Configurable tick delay lets you balance responsiveness with performance based on your needs.

**⚙️ Easy Configuration**
Full integration with Mod Menu and Cloth Config. Change settings without editing files!

**🖥️ Client-Side**
Works on any server - no server-side installation required!

## 📋 Requirements

*Fabric*
- Fabric API
- Cloth Config
- Mod Menu (optional, for config GUI)

*NeoForge*
- Absolutely Nothing!
  
## 🎮 Perfect For

- Survival gameplay
- PvP combat
- Hardcore mode
- Challenging modpacks
- End dimension exploration

## 🔧 Configuration Options

- **Enabled**: Toggle the mod on/off
- **Tick Delay**: Adjust responsiveness (0-20 ticks)

Stay protected and focus on the adventure - let Auto Totem handle your safety! 🎉

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

This mod is CLIENT-SIDE ONLY and provides automation features. While it works on any server without requiring server-side installation, please note:

**We are not responsible if you get banned from servers for using this mod.**

Some servers may consider automation mods as unfair advantages and prohibit their use. Always check server rules before using this mod in multiplayer. Use at your own risk.

For single-player and private servers, there are no restrictions.
